---
description: 'Execute plan implementation'
agent: "Developer"
model: "Claude Opus 4.6"
---
Orchestrate implementation of the attached plan using a team of developer and architect subagents via the `#runSubagent` tool.
Delegation of analysis, verifcation, architectural analysis and implementation tasks to the subagents is crucial for context savings and efficient execution.
Do not try to gather all necessary context by yourself, delegate to the subagents and let them gather the necessary context for their tasks.
